name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
benefits: Covers 3 days pre-hospitalization and 15 days post-hospitalization
Covers all pre-existing conditions from Day 1

name: Bihar Mukhyamantri Chikitsa Sahayata Kosh
description: Financial assistance for serious illnesses like Cancer, Heart Disease, and Kidney failure.
benefits: Grant for treatment in CGHS empaneled hospitals
Applicable for hospitals outside the state in specific cases

name: Ayushman Bharat – Arogya Karnataka (AB-ArK)
description: Integrated health scheme covering both BPL and APL families in Karnataka.
benefits: Government referral system for private hospitals

name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY)
description: Expanded universal health coverage for all residents of Maharashtra.

eligibility.residency: All residents of Maharashtra with valid ID
eligibility.Universal: As of July 2024, extended to all citizens

benefits: Specific high-cost treatments up to ₹2.5 Lakh (e.g. Kidney transplant)
Network of 1000+ public and private hospitals

name: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme
description: Provides high-quality healthcare to low-income families in Tamil Nadu.
benefits: Specialized surgeries like Heart transplants and Cochlear implants
